from bisect import bisect, bisect_right, bisect_left

return [[num for i in range(W)] for j in range(H)]
for i in range(2,int(sqrt(n))+1): if res[i]: for j in range(2*i,n+1,i): res[j] = False
if res[i]: for j in range(2*i,n+1,i): res[j] = False
for j in range(2*i,n+1,i): res[j] = False
while i <= self.n: self.bit[i] += x i += (i & -i)

if x <= 0: return 0 else: i = 0 r = 1 #最大としてありうる区間の長さを取得する #n以下の最小の二乗のべき(BITで管理する数列の区間で最大のもの)を求める while(r<self.n): r=r<<1 len = r while len > 0: if(i+len<self.n and self.bit[i+len]<x): x-=self.bit[i+len] i+=len len = len >> 1 return i+1
while len > 0: if(i+len<self.n and self.bit[i+len]<x): x-=self.bit[i+len] i+=len len = len >> 1
for a in range(1,max_num, 2): b = (a+1) // 2 if S[a] and S[b]: bit.add(a, 1)
for q in range(Q): l, r = MI() print(bit.sum(r)-bit.sum(l-1))
